response.original_title: 【DON’T WORRY】Why is my authenticator code not working for Uphold? Solutions here
response.overview: Urgent Sync Fix – Why is my authenticator code not working for Uphold? Your authenticator code may not work due to incorrect time sync, expired codes, or misconfigured 2FA settings. ☎➤[1→888→574→71_67] Make sure your device time is set to automatic and try generating a fresh code. 1-888 @[Uphold] If the issue continues, reset your authenticator app or contact the Support Center for 2FA recovery assistance. ☎➤[1→888→574→71_67]
